input.prompt: List the release notes / breaking changes summary for major version bumps 8.x -> 9.0.0, 9.x -> 10.0.0, and 10.x -> 11.0.0, and what changed in 11.0.1 relevant to XXE fixes. Focus on API-breaking changes (class renames, removed methods, changed constructors) that would affect code using BomParserFactory, BomParser, Bom, Component, Validator classes.

input.command: curl -s "https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/GHSA-w7mm-2j5w-jrhq" 2>&1 | head -c 200; echo; curl -s -X POST "https://api.osv.dev/v1/query" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"package":{"name":"io.pebbletemplates:pebble","ecosystem":"Maven"},"version":"3.2.0"}' | python3.12 -m json.tool

echo "=== mysql-connector-j latest versions ==="
curl -s "https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/com/mysql/mysql-connector-j/maven-metadata.xml" | grep -E "<version>|<release>|<latest>"
echo "=== postgresql latest 42.7.x ==="
curl -s "https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/org/postgresql/postgresql/maven-metadata.xml" | grep -E "<version>42\.7|<release>|<latest>"
echo "=== commons-compress latest ==="
curl -s "https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/org/apache/commons/commons-compress/maven-metadata.xml" | grep -E "<latest>|<release>"

for pv in "org.postgresql:postgresql:42.7.13" "org.apache.commons:commons-compress:1.28.0" "com.mysql:mysql-connector-j:8.2.0" "com.mysql:mysql-connector-j:8.4.0"; do
  name="${pv%:*}"; version="${pv##*:}"
  echo "=== $pv ==="
  curl -s -X POST "https://api.osv.dev/v1/query" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"package\":{\"name\":\"$name\",\"ecosystem\":\"Maven\"},\"version\":\"$version\"}" | python3.12 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print([v['id'] for v in d.get('vulns',[])] or 'clean')"
done

ALPINE_POM=$(find ~/.m2/repository/us/springett/alpine-parent -name "*.pom" | head -1)
grep -n "nimbus-jose-jwt\|jjwt\b" "$ALPINE_POM"
curl -s "https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/GHSA-5jmj-h7xm-6q6v" | python3.12 -m json.tool | head -100

curl -s "https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/com/nimbusds/nimbus-jose-jwt/maven-metadata.xml" | grep -E "<latest>|<release>"
for v in 9.37.4 9.48 10.0.2; do
echo "=== $v ==="
curl -s -X POST "https://api.osv.dev/v1/query" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"package\":{\"name\":\"com.nimbusds:nimbus-jose-jwt\",\"ecosystem\":\"Maven\"},\"version\":\"$v\"}" | python3.12 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print([v['id'] for v in d.get('vulns',[])] or 'clean')"
done

text: Now let's apply the straightforward version bumps. First, commons-compress and the JDBC drivers.

input.old_string:
<!-- JDBC Drivers -->
        <lib.jdbc-driver.mssql.version>12.4.2.jre11</lib.jdbc-driver.mssql.version>
        <!-- Upgrading to 8.0.33 as https://github.com/datanucleus/datanucleus-rdbms/issues/446 is resolved! -->
        <lib.jdbc-driver.mysql.version>8.0.33</lib.jdbc-driver.mysql.version>
        <lib.jdbc-driver.postgresql.version>42.6.0</lib.jdbc-driver.postgresql.version>
input.new_string:
<!-- JDBC Drivers -->
        <lib.jdbc-driver.mssql.version>12.4.2.jre11</lib.jdbc-driver.mssql.version>
        <!-- Upgrading to 8.0.33 as https://github.com/datanucleus/datanucleus-rdbms/issues/446 is resolved! -->
        <!-- 8.4.0: fixes CVE-2023-22102 (mysql:mysql-connector-java is no longer published past 8.0.33; project moved to com.mysql:mysql-connector-j) -->
        <lib.jdbc-driver.mysql.version>8.4.0</lib.jdbc-driver.mysql.version>
        <!-- 42.7.13: fixes CVE-2024-1597 (SQL injection via line comment generation) and CVE-2026-42198 (unbounded PBKDF2 iterations) -->
        <lib.jdbc-driver.postgresql.version>42.7.13</lib.jdbc-driver.postgresql.version>

<lib.cyclonedx-java.version>8.0.3</lib.cyclonedx-java.version>
        <lib.greenmail.version>1.6.14</lib.greenmail.version>
        <!-- Override alpine-parent's pinned jackson-databind: fixes CVE-2026-54512, CVE-2026-54513, CVE-2026-54514 -->
        <lib.jackson-databind.version>2.18.8</lib.jackson-databind.version>

<lib.cyclonedx-java.version>8.0.3</lib.cyclonedx-java.version>
        <lib.greenmail.version>1.6.14</lib.greenmail.version>
        <!-- Override alpine-parent's pinned jackson-databind: fixes CVE-2026-54512, CVE-2026-54513, CVE-2026-54514 -->
        <lib.jackson-databind.version>2.18.8</lib.jackson-databind.version>

text: Now update the mysql-connector dependency coordinates and add the commons-compress fix + nimbus-jose-jwt override:

input.old_string:
<dependency>
            <groupId>mysql</groupId>
            <artifactId>mysql-connector-java</artifactId>
            <version>${lib.jdbc-driver.mysql.version}</version>
            <exclusions>
                <!--
                    Protobuf is only required for MySQL X DevAPI, which we do not use.
                    https://dev.mysql.com/doc/connector-j/8.0/en/connector-j-installing-maven.html
                -->
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>com.google.protobuf</groupId>
                    <artifactId>protobuf-java</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
            </exclusions>
        </dependency>
input.new_string:
<!-- mysql:mysql-connector-java was relocated to com.mysql:mysql-connector-j as of 8.1.0;
             the old coordinates were never published past 8.0.33, which is vulnerable to
             CVE-2023-22102. -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.mysql</groupId>
            <artifactId>mysql-connector-j</artifactId>
            <version>${lib.jdbc-driver.mysql.version}</version>
            <exclusions>
                <!--
                    Protobuf is only required for MySQL X DevAPI, which we do not use.
                    https://dev.mysql.com/doc/connector-j/8.0/en/connector-j-installing-maven.html
                -->
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>com.google.protobuf</groupId>
                    <artifactId>protobuf-java</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
            </exclusions>
        </dependency>

text: Now commons-compress version and adding the nimbus-jose-jwt override:

input.new_string:
<!-- Commons Compress -->
        <!-- 1.28.0: fixes CVE-2024-25710 (infinite loop DoS on corrupted DUMP file) and
             CVE-2024-26308 (OutOfMemoryError unpacking broken Pack200 file) -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId>
            <artifactId>commons-compress</artifactId>
            <version>1.28.0</version>
        </dependency>

<!-- Override nimbus-jose-jwt pulled in transitively via alpine-server -> oauth2-oidc-sdk:
             fixes CVE-2023-52428 and CVE-2025-53864 (both denial-of-service issues). -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.nimbusds</groupId>
            <artifactId>nimbus-jose-jwt</artifactId>
            <version>9.37.4</version>
        </dependency>
        <!-- CVSS Calculator -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>us.springett</groupId>
            <artifactId>cvss-calculator</artifactId>
            <version>${lib.cvss-calculator.version}</version>
        </dependency>
